output: Our equivalent MILP formulation solved the tested benchmark instances 40% faster while preserving the same feasible set and optimal objective value. Its valid contribution is computational efficiency under the stated test conditions; it does not by itself change retailer profit. Operational value would require evidence that the faster solution arrives before a decision deadline and enables a retailer to implement a better action, reoptimize more frequently, assess more scenarios, or obtain a better feasible incumbent in time.
